base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of small_mario_skid — a character (playable) from 1985 super mario bros. Turning/skid pose — leaning-back with arms-out, back-foot planted. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Turning/skid pose — leaning-back with arms-out, back-foot planted; played when player changes direction mid-run
